category_sources: source_facts.description says tdb is Trivial DataBase by the Samba project; official tdb docs describe a simple database API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tdb; current_curation.display-name also gives tdb.
docs_sources: Official tdb.samba.org documentation provides the main documentation page and API reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official tdb documentation says latest code is fetched via Samba git and then uses the source/lib/tdb subtree.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Trivial DataBase by Samba; official API docs describe tdb as similar to GDBM with multiple simultaneous writers and internal locking.
